creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194901
[PATCH] net/torsocks: fetch distfile from official repository

I removed the USE_GITHUB stuff and pointed the MASTER_SITES to fetch this port's distfile from the official repository hosted by The Tor Project. while here, I also added the LICENSE_FILE and followed chap 15 of porter's handbook (Order of Variables in Port Makefiles).

kept other stuff in the Makefile as is, like the 'echoes' after building the source and the additional 'check' target.
